default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategize for a client presentation on programmatic content generation for a healthcare website.](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Targeting large-scale content production (30k+ pages) for healthcare topics can be highly lucrative](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Plan to showcase competitor analysis, keyword gap insights, and a sample article generation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Aim to differentiate by using influencer-style voices and archetypes for content personalization](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Recent negotiation with air ops secured more favorable terms and future feature commitments](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Analysis and Content Strategy

  - [Analyzed competitors like GoodRx (23M traffic, 37k pages)](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Imported URLs and keyword gap analysis into Airtable for relational mapping](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Identified high-potential content areas: conditions outperform "pharmacies near me" and comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Strategy: Focus on underserved, high-traffic topics (e.g., "Adderall vs. Vyvanse")](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [Plan to create a sample article on medication comparison (e.g., Adderall vs. Vyvanse)](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Aim to improve upon existing top search results by adding graphics and removing ads](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Considering use of government websites (via site: protocol) for authoritative sources](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Daniel to work on keyword analysis while Marcel focuses on article generation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Content Personalization Strategy

  - [Propose post-processing to mimic popular medical influencers' voices (e.g., Dr. Mike, Andrew Huberman)](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Develop custom archetypes based on client's existing popular collaborators](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Goal: Make complex medical information more accessible and engaging](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### Client Presentation Approach

  - [30-minute meeting scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Plan to show glimpse of strategy, sample article, and potentially 50 generated articles](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Will screen share and provide link during meeting, avoiding pre-meeting content sharing](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### Air Ops Negotiation Update

  - [Secured more favorable terms without full 6-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Obtained commitments for future features:](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [More granular permissioning on workflows and workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [Parallelization of tasks (expected by early February)](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Agreement to sign for increased payment due to value received](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### Exploration of Alternative Tools

  - [Daniel experimenting with Mastermind from LangChain](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Potential advantages: UI for workflow replay, easier retrying of nodes with same input](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Possibility to contribute integrations to the framework](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel: Continue working on strategy presentation and article generation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Daniel: Focus on keyword analysis and attempt to create 50 sample articles](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Prepare compelling presentation comparing generated content to competitors like GoodRx](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Follow up with air ops on committed feature developments (permissioning, parallelization)](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Further explore Mastermind as a potential tool for workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/ssQLr7-syPboXTVixTbhBsXWNpL_t8yS?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

action_items.description: Create workflow & generate 50+ sample articles for Hims, inc. 1 high-quality example. Compare to BuzzRx. Finish before 6pm dinner.
Prep strategy presentation for Hims meeting tmrw. Inc. keyword analysis, competitor insights (GoodRx, Healthline). Create sample article template.
Set up screen-sharing for Hims meeting. Prepare to show 3 quick article examples w/o sending beforehand.
